name: Enable database extensions
sql: CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS "uuid-ossp";
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS "pg_cron";
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS "pg_net";

name: Create all database tables
sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS households (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(), name TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'My Household', invite_code TEXT UNIQUE DEFAULT upper(substring(md5(random()::text),1,8)), shared_meal_pref TEXT DEFAULT 'mixed', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW());

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_profiles (id UUID PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, household_id UUID REFERENCES households(id) ON DELETE SET NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', avatar_color TEXT DEFAULT 'linear-gradient(135deg,#3D7A52,#1A3320)', sex TEXT DEFAULT 'other' CHECK (sex IN ('male','female','other')), age INT, height_cm NUMERIC(5,1), weight_kg NUMERIC(5,1), goal TEXT DEFAULT 'health' CHECK (goal IN ('recomp','loss','gain','maintain','endurance','health')), activity_level TEXT DEFAULT 'moderate' CHECK (activity_level IN ('sedentary','light','moderate','very')), dietary_prefs TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}', allergies TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}', target_kcal INT, target_protein INT, target_carbs INT, target_fat INT, plan TEXT DEFAULT 'free' CHECK (plan IN ('free','premium','family')), stripe_customer_id TEXT, plan_expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ, onboarding_complete BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW());
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_profiles_household ON user_profiles(household_id);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pantry_items (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(), household_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES households(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, name TEXT NOT NULL, emoji TEXT DEFAULT '🛒', category TEXT DEFAULT 'Other', quantity_current NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, quantity_max NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1000, unit TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'g', reorder_threshold_pct INT DEFAULT 25, reorder_qty_label TEXT DEFAULT '1 pack', expires_at DATE, barcode TEXT, brand TEXT, product_image_url TEXT, nutriscore_grade TEXT, kcal_per_100g NUMERIC(7,2) DEFAULT 0, protein_per_100g NUMERIC(6,2) DEFAULT 0, carbs_per_100g NUMERIC(6,2) DEFAULT 0, fat_per_100g NUMERIC(6,2) DEFAULT 0, auto_added_to_grocery BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, is_staple BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, added_by UUID REFERENCES user_profiles(id), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW());
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pantry_household ON pantry_items(household_id);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pantry_consumption_log (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(), pantry_item_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES pantry_items(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, household_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES households(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, consumed_by UUID REFERENCES user_profiles(id), quantity_used NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL, unit TEXT NOT NULL, consumed_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW());

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pantry_predictions (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(), pantry_item_id UUID NOT NULL UNIQUE REFERENCES pantry_items(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, avg_daily_use NUMERIC(10,3) DEFAULT 0, predicted_runout_at DATE, confidence NUMERIC(3,2) DEFAULT 0, last_computed_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW());

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS recipes (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(), name TEXT NOT NULL, emoji TEXT DEFAULT '🍽️', slot TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (slot IN ('breakfast','lunch','dinner','snack')), tags TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}', sex_pref TEXT DEFAULT 'any' CHECK (sex_pref IN ('M','F','any')), nutrients TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}', kcal INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, protein_g NUMERIC(6,1) DEFAULT 0, carbs_g NUMERIC(6,1) DEFAULT 0, fat_g NUMERIC(6,1) DEFAULT 0, prep_time_mins INT DEFAULT 20, servings INT DEFAULT 1, instructions TEXT[], source TEXT DEFAULT 'pantryfit', source_id TEXT, video_url TEXT, image_url TEXT, created_by_household UUID REFERENCES households(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, is_public BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW());
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_recipes_slot ON recipes(slot);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS recipe_ingredients (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(), recipe_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES recipes(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, name TEXT NOT NULL, emoji TEXT DEFAULT '🥄', quantity NUMERIC(10,3) NOT NULL, unit TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'g', pantry_item_name TEXT, grams_equivalent NUMERIC(10,3), kcal_per_100g NUMERIC(7,2) DEFAULT 0, protein_per_100g NUMERIC(6,2) DEFAULT 0, carbs_per_100g NUMERIC(6,2) DEFAULT 0, fat_per_100g NUMERIC(6,2) DEFAULT 0, scanned_brand TEXT, scanned_barcode TEXT, sort_order INT DEFAULT 0);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS meal_plans (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(), household_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES households(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, plan_date DATE NOT NULL, slot TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (slot IN ('breakfast','lunch','dinner','snack')), recipe_id UUID REFERENCES recipes(id) ON DELETE SET NULL, is_shared BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, custom_name TEXT, custom_kcal INT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), UNIQUE(household_id, plan_date, slot));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS meal_logs (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(), user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES user_profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, household_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES households(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, recipe_id UUID REFERENCES recipes(id) ON DELETE SET NULL, log_date DATE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE, slot TEXT, name TEXT NOT NULL, grams_eaten NUMERIC(8,1), kcal INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, protein_g NUMERIC(6,1) DEFAULT 0, carbs_g NUMERIC(6,1) DEFAULT 0, fat_g NUMERIC(6,1) DEFAULT 0, logged_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW());

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS grocery_items (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(), household_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES households(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, name TEXT NOT NULL, emoji TEXT DEFAULT '🛒', quantity_label TEXT, category TEXT DEFAULT 'Other', source TEXT DEFAULT 'manual' CHECK (source IN ('manual','auto_threshold','auto_prediction','meal_plan','expiry')), source_reason TEXT, pantry_item_id UUID REFERENCES pantry_items(id) ON DELETE SET NULL, recipe_id UUID REFERENCES recipes(id) ON DELETE SET NULL, is_checked BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, checked_by UUID REFERENCES user_profiles(id), checked_at TIMESTAMPTZ, added_by UUID REFERENCES user_profiles(id), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW());

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(), household_id UUID REFERENCES households(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, user_id UUID REFERENCES user_profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, type TEXT NOT NULL, title TEXT NOT NULL, body TEXT NOT NULL, action_url TEXT, is_read BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, push_sent BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, push_sent_at TIMESTAMPTZ, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW());

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS push_tokens (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(), user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES user_profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, token TEXT NOT NULL, platform TEXT CHECK (platform IN ('ios','android','web')), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), UNIQUE(user_id, token));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ingredient_aliases (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(), alias TEXT NOT NULL, canonical TEXT NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(), UNIQUE(alias));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subscription_events (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(), user_id UUID REFERENCES user_profiles(id) ON DELETE SET NULL, stripe_event_id TEXT UNIQUE, event_type TEXT NOT NULL, plan TEXT, amount_pence INT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW());

name: Create database functions and triggers
sql: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION auth_household_id() RETURNS UUID LANGUAGE sql STABLE AS $$ SELECT household_id FROM user_profiles WHERE id=auth.uid() $$;

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION calculate_macro_targets(p_sex TEXT,p_age INT,p_height_cm NUMERIC,p_weight_kg NUMERIC,p_activity TEXT,p_goal TEXT) RETURNS TABLE(kcal INT,protein_g INT,carbs_g INT,fat_g INT) LANGUAGE plpgsql AS $$ DECLARE v_bmr NUMERIC;v_tdee NUMERIC;v_cal NUMERIC;v_act NUMERIC;v_delta NUMERIC;v_pm NUMERIC;v_fp NUMERIC;v_sp NUMERIC;v_sf NUMERIC;v_prot INT;v_fat INT;v_carb INT; BEGIN v_act:=CASE p_activity WHEN 'sedentary' THEN 1.2 WHEN 'light' THEN 1.375 WHEN 'very' THEN 1.725 ELSE 1.55 END; v_bmr:=CASE WHEN p_sex='female' THEN (10*p_weight_kg)+(6.25*p_height_cm)-(5*p_age)-161 ELSE (10*p_weight_kg)+(6.25*p_height_cm)-(5*p_age)+5 END; v_tdee:=v_bmr*v_act; v_delta:=CASE p_goal WHEN 'recomp' THEN -200 WHEN 'loss' THEN -450 WHEN 'gain' THEN 350 WHEN 'endurance' THEN 100 ELSE 0 END; v_cal:=v_tdee+v_delta; v_pm:=CASE p_goal WHEN 'recomp' THEN 2.2 WHEN 'loss' THEN 2.0 WHEN 'gain' THEN 2.4 WHEN 'endurance' THEN 1.8 ELSE 1.6 END; v_fp:=CASE p_goal WHEN 'recomp' THEN 0.25 WHEN 'loss' THEN 0.28 WHEN 'gain' THEN 0.25 WHEN 'endurance' THEN 0.20 ELSE 0.30 END; v_sp:=CASE WHEN p_sex='female' THEN -0.15 ELSE 0 END; v_sf:=CASE WHEN p_sex='female' THEN 0.02 ELSE 0 END; v_prot:=ROUND(p_weight_kg*(v_pm+v_sp)); v_fat:=ROUND(v_cal*(v_fp+v_sf)/9); v_carb:=GREATEST(50,ROUND((v_cal-v_prot*4-v_fat*9)/4)); RETURN QUERY SELECT ROUND(v_cal)::INT,v_prot,v_carb,v_fat; END; $$;

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION trigger_calc_macros() RETURNS TRIGGER LANGUAGE plpgsql AS $$ DECLARE v RECORD; BEGIN IF NEW.age IS NOT NULL AND NEW.height_cm IS NOT NULL AND NEW.weight_kg IS NOT NULL AND NEW.goal IS NOT NULL AND NEW.activity_level IS NOT NULL THEN SELECT * INTO v FROM calculate_macro_targets(NEW.sex,NEW.age,NEW.height_cm,NEW.weight_kg,NEW.activity_level,NEW.goal); NEW.target_kcal:=v.kcal;NEW.target_protein:=v.protein_g;NEW.target_carbs:=v.carbs_g;NEW.target_fat:=v.fat_g; END IF; NEW.updated_at:=NOW();RETURN NEW; END; $$;

DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS calc_macros_on_profile_change ON user_profiles; CREATE TRIGGER calc_macros_on_profile_change BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE OF sex,age,height_cm,weight_kg,activity_level,goal ON user_profiles FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION trigger_calc_macros();

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION run_learning_engine() RETURNS void LANGUAGE plpgsql AS $$ DECLARE v RECORD;v_avg NUMERIC;v_days NUMERIC;v_pct NUMERIC; BEGIN FOR v IN SELECT pi.id,pi.household_id,pi.name,pi.emoji,pi.quantity_current,pi.quantity_max,pi.unit,pi.reorder_threshold_pct,pi.reorder_qty_label,pi.category,pi.auto_added_to_grocery, COALESCE(SUM(cl.quantity_used) FILTER (WHERE cl.consumed_at>=NOW()-INTERVAL '30 days')/GREATEST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW()-MIN(cl.consumed_at) FILTER (WHERE cl.consumed_at>=NOW()-INTERVAL '30 days')))/86400,1),0) AS avg_daily, COUNT(cl.id) FILTER (WHERE cl.consumed_at>=NOW()-INTERVAL '30 days') AS log_count FROM pantry_items pi LEFT JOIN pantry_consumption_log cl ON cl.pantry_item_id=pi.id GROUP BY pi.id LOOP v_avg:=v.avg_daily; IF v_avg>0 THEN v_days:=v.quantity_current/v_avg; ELSE v_days:=999; END IF; INSERT INTO pantry_predictions(pantry_item_id,avg_daily_use,predicted_runout_at,confidence,last_computed_at) VALUES(v.id,v_avg,CASE WHEN v_days<999 THEN CURRENT_DATE+v_days::INT ELSE NULL END,LEAST(v.log_count::NUMERIC/10,1.0),NOW()) ON CONFLICT(pantry_item_id) DO UPDATE SET avg_daily_use=EXCLUDED.avg_daily_use,predicted_runout_at=EXCLUDED.predicted_runout_at,confidence=EXCLUDED.confidence,last_computed_at=NOW(); v_pct:=(v.quantity_current/NULLIF(v.quantity_max,0))*100; IF (v_days<=3 OR v_pct<=v.reorder_threshold_pct) AND NOT v.auto_added_to_grocery THEN INSERT INTO grocery_items(household_id,name,emoji,quantity_label,category,source,source_reason,pantry_item_id) VALUES(v.household_id,v.name,v.emoji,v.reorder_qty_label,v.category,CASE WHEN v_days<=3 THEN 'auto_prediction' ELSE 'auto_threshold' END,CASE WHEN v_days<=3 THEN format('Runs out in ~%s day(s)',ROUND(v_days)) ELSE format('Below %s%% threshold',v.reorder_threshold_pct) END,v.id) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING; UPDATE pantry_items SET auto_added_to_grocery=TRUE WHERE id=v.id; INSERT INTO notifications(household_id,type,title,body) VALUES(v.household_id,'auto_grocery_add','Auto-added to grocery',format('%s added — running low',v.name)); END IF; END LOOP; END; $$;

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION check_expiry_and_notify() RETURNS void LANGUAGE plpgsql AS $$ DECLARE v RECORD; BEGIN FOR v IN SELECT pi.id,pi.household_id,pi.name,(pi.expires_at-CURRENT_DATE) AS days FROM pantry_items pi WHERE pi.expires_at IS NOT NULL AND pi.expires_at>=CURRENT_DATE AND pi.expires_at<=CURRENT_DATE+INTERVAL '3 days' LOOP INSERT INTO notifications(household_id,type,title,body) SELECT v.household_id,'expiry_warning',CASE WHEN v.days=0 THEN 'Expires today' WHEN v.days=1 THEN 'Expires tomorrow' ELSE format('Expires in %s days',v.days) END,format('%s — use it soon',v.name) WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM notifications WHERE household_id=v.household_id AND type='expiry_warning' AND body LIKE '%'||v.name||'%' AND created_at>=CURRENT_DATE); END LOOP; END; $$;

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION auto_generate_weekly_plan(p_household_id UUID,p_week_start DATE DEFAULT NULL) RETURNS INT LANGUAGE plpgsql AS $$ DECLARE v_start DATE;v_day DATE;v_slot TEXT;v_rid UUID;v_count INT:=0;v_slots TEXT[]:=ARRAY['breakfast','lunch','dinner','snack']; BEGIN v_start:=COALESCE(p_week_start,date_trunc('week',CURRENT_DATE+INTERVAL '7 days')::DATE); FOR i IN 0..6 LOOP v_day:=v_start+i; FOREACH v_slot IN ARRAY v_slots LOOP CONTINUE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM meal_plans WHERE household_id=p_household_id AND plan_date=v_day AND slot=v_slot); SELECT r.id INTO v_rid FROM recipes r WHERE r.slot=v_slot AND r.is_public=TRUE AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM meal_logs ml WHERE ml.recipe_id=r.id AND ml.household_id=p_household_id AND ml.log_date>=CURRENT_DATE-INTERVAL '7 days') ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT 1; IF v_rid IS NOT NULL THEN INSERT INTO meal_plans(household_id,plan_date,slot,recipe_id,is_shared) VALUES(p_household_id,v_day,v_slot,v_rid,v_slot IN('lunch','dinner')) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING; v_count:=v_count+1; END IF; END LOOP; END LOOP; RETURN v_count; END; $$;

name: Set up data security
sql: ALTER TABLE user_profiles ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; ALTER TABLE households ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; ALTER TABLE pantry_items ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; ALTER TABLE pantry_consumption_log ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; ALTER TABLE recipes ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; ALTER TABLE recipe_ingredients ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; ALTER TABLE meal_plans ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; ALTER TABLE meal_logs ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; ALTER TABLE grocery_items ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; ALTER TABLE notifications ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; ALTER TABLE push_tokens ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

DO $$ BEGIN IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename='user_profiles' AND policyname='own_profile') THEN CREATE POLICY own_profile ON user_profiles USING(id=auth.uid()); CREATE POLICY household_profiles ON user_profiles USING(household_id=auth_household_id()); END IF; IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename='households' AND policyname='member_hh') THEN CREATE POLICY member_hh ON households USING(id=auth_household_id()); END IF; IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename='pantry_items' AND policyname='pantry_sel') THEN CREATE POLICY pantry_sel ON pantry_items FOR SELECT USING(household_id=auth_household_id()); CREATE POLICY pantry_ins ON pantry_items FOR INSERT WITH CHECK(household_id=auth_household_id()); CREATE POLICY pantry_upd ON pantry_items FOR UPDATE USING(household_id=auth_household_id()); CREATE POLICY pantry_del ON pantry_items FOR DELETE USING(household_id=auth_household_id()); END IF; IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename='grocery_items' AND policyname='groc_sel') THEN CREATE POLICY groc_sel ON grocery_items FOR SELECT USING(household_id=auth_household_id()); CREATE POLICY groc_ins ON grocery_items FOR INSERT WITH CHECK(household_id=auth_household_id()); CREATE POLICY groc_upd ON grocery_items FOR UPDATE USING(household_id=auth_household_id()); CREATE POLICY groc_del ON grocery_items FOR DELETE USING(household_id=auth_household_id()); END IF; IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename='meal_plans' AND policyname='plans_sel') THEN CREATE POLICY plans_sel ON meal_plans FOR SELECT USING(household_id=auth_household_id()); CREATE POLICY plans_ins ON meal_plans FOR INSERT WITH CHECK(household_id=auth_household_id()); CREATE POLICY plans_upd ON meal_plans FOR UPDATE USING(household_id=auth_household_id()); END IF; IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename='meal_logs' AND policyname='logs_sel') THEN CREATE POLICY logs_sel ON meal_logs FOR SELECT USING(user_id=auth.uid()); CREATE POLICY logs_hh ON meal_logs FOR SELECT USING(household_id=auth_household_id()); CREATE POLICY logs_ins ON meal_logs FOR INSERT WITH CHECK(user_id=auth.uid()); END IF; IF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pg_policies WHERE tablename='notifications' AND policyname='notif_sel') THEN CREATE POLICY notif_sel ON notifications USING(user_id=auth.uid() OR household_id=auth_household_id()); END IF; END $$;

name: Start 6 background jobs
sql: SELECT cron.schedule('pantryfit-learning-engine','0 * * * *','SELECT run_learning_engine();');
SELECT cron.schedule('pantryfit-expiry-check','0 7 * * *','SELECT check_expiry_and_notify();');
SELECT cron.schedule('pantryfit-weekly-planner','0 18 * * 0','SELECT auto_generate_weekly_plan(h.id) FROM households h;');

SELECT cron.schedule('pantryfit-meal-reminders','0 17 * * *','INSERT INTO notifications(household_id,type,title,body) SELECT mp.household_id,''meal_reminder'',''Dinner prep reminder'',format(''Tonight: %s %s'',r.emoji,r.name) FROM meal_plans mp JOIN recipes r ON r.id=mp.recipe_id WHERE mp.plan_date=CURRENT_DATE AND mp.slot=''dinner'' AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM notifications n WHERE n.household_id=mp.household_id AND n.type=''meal_reminder'' AND n.created_at>=CURRENT_DATE);');

SELECT cron.schedule('pantryfit-weekly-checkin','0 8 * * 1','INSERT INTO notifications(user_id,household_id,type,title,body) SELECT up.id,up.household_id,''goal_check'',''Weekly check-in'',format(''%s: last week avg %s kcal'',up.name,ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(ml.kcal),0))) FROM user_profiles up LEFT JOIN meal_logs ml ON ml.user_id=up.id AND ml.log_date>=CURRENT_DATE-INTERVAL ''7 days'' WHERE up.household_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY up.id,up.household_id,up.name;');

SELECT cron.schedule('pantryfit-grocery-reconcile','0 23 * * *','INSERT INTO grocery_items(household_id,name,emoji,quantity_label,category,source,source_reason,recipe_id) SELECT DISTINCT mp.household_id,ri.name,''🛒'',ri.quantity::TEXT||ri.unit,''Recipe ingredients'',''meal_plan'',format(''For: %s on %s'',r.name,to_char(mp.plan_date,''Dy DD Mon'')),r.id FROM meal_plans mp JOIN recipes r ON r.id=mp.recipe_id JOIN recipe_ingredients ri ON ri.recipe_id=r.id WHERE mp.plan_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE+7 AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pantry_items pi WHERE pi.household_id=mp.household_id AND lower(pi.name) ILIKE ''%''||lower(split_part(ri.name,'' '',1))||''%'' AND pi.quantity_current>0) AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM grocery_items gi WHERE gi.household_id=mp.household_id AND lower(gi.name) ILIKE ''%''||lower(split_part(ri.name,'' '',1))||''%'' AND NOT gi.is_checked) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;');

name: Enable live sync between devices
sql: ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE grocery_items;
ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE meal_plans;
ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE pantry_items;
ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE notifications;
ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE meal_logs;

name: Add ingredient matching data
sql: INSERT INTO ingredient_aliases(alias,canonical) VALUES ('chicken fillet','chicken breast'),('chicken thigh','chicken breast'),('raw chicken','chicken breast'),('skinless chicken','chicken breast'),('ground beef','beef mince'),('minced beef','beef mince'),('courgette','zucchini'),('aubergine','eggplant'),('coriander','cilantro'),('spring onion','scallion'),('rocket','arugula'),('prawns','shrimp'),('king prawns','shrimp'),('natural yogurt','greek yoghurt'),('plain yogurt','greek yoghurt'),('whole milk','milk'),('skimmed milk','milk'),('olive oil','oil'),('vegetable oil','oil'),('rapeseed oil','oil'),('capsicum','bell pepper'),('courgetti','zucchini noodles'),('swede','rutabaga'),('beetroot','beet') ON CONFLICT(alias) DO NOTHING;

files.manifest.json:
{
  "name": "PantryFit",
  "short_name": "PantryFit",
  "description": "Household nutrition — pantry tracking, meal planning, smart grocery",
  "start_url": "/",
  "display": "standalone",
  "orientation": "portrait",
  "background_color": "#1A3320",
  "theme_color": "#1A3320",
  "icons": [
    {
      "src": "icon-192.svg",
      "sizes": "192x192",
      "type": "image/svg+xml",
      "purpose": "any maskable"
    },
    {
      "src": "icon-512.svg",
      "sizes": "512x512",
      "type": "image/svg+xml",
      "purpose": "any maskable"
    }
  ],
  "screenshots": [],
  "categories": ["food", "health", "lifestyle"],
  "lang": "en-GB"
}
files.icon-192.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 192 192">
  <rect width="192" height="192" rx="40" fill="#1A3320"/>
  <rect width="192" height="192" rx="40" fill="url(#g)"/>
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="g" x1="0" y1="0" x2="192" y2="192" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#1A3320"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0D1F14"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <!-- Plate circle -->
  <circle cx="96" cy="100" r="52" fill="none" stroke="rgba(109,191,138,0.25)" stroke-width="3"/>
  <!-- Fork left -->
  <rect x="52" y="56" width="3" height="32" rx="1.5" fill="#6DBF8A"/>
  <rect x="48" y="56" width="3" height="20" rx="1.5" fill="#6DBF8A"/>
  <rect x="56" y="56" width="3" height="20" rx="1.5" fill="#6DBF8A"/>
  <rect x="50" y="72" width="8" height="16" rx="1.5" fill="#6DBF8A"/>
  <!-- Knife right -->
  <rect x="138" y="56" width="3" height="48" rx="1.5" fill="#6DBF8A"/>
  <path d="M138 56 Q145 68 141 76 L138 76 Z" fill="#6DBF8A"/>
  <!-- Leaf / plant in plate -->
  <ellipse cx="96" cy="97" rx="18" ry="14" fill="#3D7A52"/>
  <ellipse cx="84" cy="104" rx="10" ry="8" fill="#4A9060" transform="rotate(-20,84,104)"/>
  <ellipse cx="108" cy="104" rx="10" ry="8" fill="#4A9060" transform="rotate(20,108,104)"/>
  <circle cx="96" cy="96" r="5" fill="#6DBF8A"/>
  <!-- PF text -->
  <text x="96" y="155" font-family="Georgia,serif" font-size="18" font-weight="700" fill="rgba(109,191,138,0.9)" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="2">PANTRYFIT</text>
</svg>
